title: Easy Pachycephalosaurus Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Pachycephalosaurus Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Simple outline of the dome-headed Pachycephalosaurus dinosaur. Free printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Pachycephalosaurus was famous for its dome-shaped skull, which was up to 9 inches (22 cm) thick and made of solid bone.
Scientists believe Pachycephalosaurus used its dome head for head-butting rivals or flanking predators during disputes in the Late Cretaceous.
